reasoning: To estimate the probability of Mortgage-Backed Securities held by commercial banks increasing, I used the FRED time series history as the primary source of truth. The series shows high week-to-week volatility (std dev of residuals ~10) relative to a very slight upward drift (slope ~0.10 per day). The automated statistical trend analysis provided a combined probability estimate of 53% for exceeding the most recent value (2698). Anchoring on this near-term baseline, I set the probability for the first resolution date (2026-02-08) to 53%. Per the explicit instructions to increase uncertainty for more distant dates (moving probabilities closer to 0.5), I adjusted the estimate for the second resolution date (2026-03-03) downward to 51%.
